title: Platini begins legal proceedings against Fifa
summary: Former UEFA president Michel Platini has initiated civil and legal proceedings against FIFA and current president Gianni Infantino over corruption allegations from 2015. This marks a significant escalation in the long-standing dispute between Platini and FIFA leadership.
content: Former Uefa president Michel Platini initiaites civil and legal proceedings against Fifa and current president Gianni Infantino over corruption allegations from 2015.

zh.title: 普拉蒂尼对国际足联提起法律诉讼
zh.summary: 前欧足联主席米歇尔·普拉蒂尼针对国际足联及现任主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺就2015年的腐败指控提起民事和法律诉讼。这标志着普拉蒂尼与国际足联领导层之间长期争端的重大升级。

title: Palmer and Joao Pedro feature in Madonna video
summary: Chelsea forwards Cole Palmer and Joao Pedro made surprise appearances in a promotional film for Madonna's new album. The cameo marks an unexpected crossover between professional football and popular music.
content: Chelsea forwards Cole Palmer and Joao Pedro make a surprise appearance in a promotional film for Madonna's new album.

zh.title: 帕尔默和若奥·佩德罗在麦当娜音乐视频中亮相
zh.summary: 切尔西前锋科尔·帕尔默和若奥·佩德罗在麦当娜新专辑的宣传影片中意外亮相。这个客串标志着职业足球与流行音乐之间的意外跨界合作。

title: Tickets for Iran fans revoked, says federation
summary: Iran's football federation announced that its ticket allocation for the World Cup 2026 group stage has been revoked just days before the tournament. The decision leaves Iranian supporters without official access to watch their team's matches.
content: Iran's football federation says its allocation of tickets for the group stage of the World Cup has been revoked just days before the tournament.

zh.title: 伊朗足协称伊朗球迷的门票被撤销
zh.summary: 伊朗足球协会宣布，其在2026年世界杯小组赛的门票配额在赛事开始前数天被撤销。该决定使伊朗球迷无法获得官方渠道观看本队比赛。

title: The flag Iranians are not allowed to wave at the World Cup
summary: Iranian football fans in Los Angeles are challenging FIFA restrictions on waving Iran's pre-1979 flag, preferring the historical banner over the current national flag. The dispute reflects deep political divisions within the Iranian diaspora regarding national symbols.
content: Iran football fans living in Los Angeles explain why they want to wave Iran's pre-1979 Islamic revolution flag and dismiss the one that is on their team's shirt.

zh.title: 伊朗人在世界杯上不被允许挥舞的国旗
zh.summary: 洛杉矶的伊朗足球迷正在挑战国际足联关于挥舞1979年前伊朗国旗的限制,他们更倾向于历史性的旗帜而非现在的国旗。这个争议反映了伊朗侨民就国家象征的深刻政治分歧。

title: Crespo on Messi, returning to England and life as a manager
summary: Hernan Crespo discusses his coaching philosophy, emphasizing goals, passion, and intensity as defining characteristics from his playing career that now guide his managerial approach. The article explores his perspective on returning to England and his development as a coach.
content: Goals, passion and intensity define Hernan Crespo as a player. They are the qualities he wants his teams to show as a coach.

zh.title: 克雷斯波论梅西、重返英格兰和作为教练的人生
zh.summary: 埃尔南·克雷斯波讨论了他的执教哲学,强调进球、激情和强度是他职业生涯中的定义特征,现在指导他的执教方法。文章探讨了他对重返英格兰的看法和他作为教练的成长发展。

title: More than the Score
summary: After years of near-misses and failed qualification attempts, Uzbekistan will make their debut appearance at the World Cup 2026. Their qualification marks a historic moment for Central Asian football.
content: World Cup 2026: After years of near-misses, Uzbekistan will make their debut

zh.title: 不仅仅是比分
zh.summary: 经过多年的险些成功和多次失败的资格赛尝试,乌兹别克斯坦将在2026年世界杯上首次亮相。他们的出线标志着中亚足球的一个历史性时刻。

title: Play BBC Sport's new World Cup predictor game
summary: BBC Sport has launched a new World Cup predictor game that allows fans to test their prediction skills with the chance to win a signed football. The interactive game engages supporters ahead of the tournament.
content: Play BBC Sport's new World Cup predictor game to be in with the chance of winning a signed football.

zh.title: 参加BBC体育推出的新世界杯预测游戏

title: Why France's Olise is moving into Ballon d'Or picture
summary: Following a first international hat-trick against Northern Ireland, former France striker Louis Saha believes Michael Olise can move into Ballon d'Or contention. The performance demonstrates Olise's elite talent and potential among the world's best players.
content: After a first international hat-trick against Northern Ireland, former France striker Louis Saha believes Michael Olise can move into Ballon d'Or contention.

zh.title: 法国边锋奥利塞为何进入金球奖候选名单
zh.summary: 在对北爱尔兰的国际比赛中完成首次帽子戏法后,前法国前锋路易斯·萨哈认为迈克尔·奥利塞可以进入金球奖竞争。这场表现展现了奥利塞在世界顶级球员中的卓越才能和潜力。

title: 'Diogo will be with you' - Jota's widow writes to Robertson
summary: Diogo Jota's widow has written to Scotland captain Andrew Robertson, urging him to carry his former Liverpool teammate in his heart during the World Cup. The emotional message honors Jota's memory and their shared connection through football.
content: Diogo Jota's widow urges Scotland captain Andrew Robertson to carry his former Liverpool team-mate "in your heart" when he plays at the World Cup.

zh.title: "迪奥戈会与你同在"——若塔的遗孀写信给罗伯逊
zh.summary: 迪奥戈·若塔的遗孀写信给苏格兰队长安德鲁·罗伯逊,敦促他在世界杯期间将这位前利物浦队友铭记在心。这份信息向若塔的记忆致敬,并承认他们通过足球建立的共同联系。

summary: A podcast assessing Scotland's strikers for the World Cup and discussing disagreement with Norway over team selection and striker performance.

summary: BBC Sport commentators have identified 20 breakout star candidates for the 2026 World Cup, featuring players with colorful nicknames like 'Mazadona', 'Einstein', and 'The Ant'.
content: BBC Sport TV and radio commentators pick the players they think could be the breakout stars of the 2026 World Cup.

title: Tottenham remain keen on Hearts' Wilson - gossip
summary: Tottenham remains interested in signing Hearts forward Wilson as the Scottish club enters pre-season, with competition from other potential suitors.
content: Hearts forward remains in thoughts of Tottenham as Hibs attacker is due back for pre-season.

title: Football regulator seeks 'urgent information' from Sullivan after allegations
summary: Football regulators are seeking urgent information from a billionaire facing accusations of misconduct from multiple women, including allegations of abusing power and preying on victims in their late teens.
content: Multiple women accuse the billionaire of abusing his power and preying on them for sex, in some cases when they were in their late teens.

zh.title: 足球监管机构就指控向沙利文寻求"紧急信息"
zh.summary: 足球监管机构正在向一位面临多名女性不当行为指控的亿万富翁寻求紧急信息，这些指控包括滥用权力和对十几岁晚期受害者的掠夺性行为。

title: Scotland's fateful 1978 World Cup campaign still resonates
summary: Scotland's 1978 World Cup campaign, remembered as a historical moment when a country lost control of its ambitions, continues to resonate in football culture and national memory.
content: There's a mesmeric quality to this story of '78, a legend of how a man and a country lost the run of itself, writes Tom English.

zh.title: 苏格兰命运多舛的1978年世界杯运动仍在产生共鸣

title: Two brothers, two nations, one World Cup & how grief bound them
summary: Brothers Harry and John Souttar will represent different nations at the 2026 World Cup, bonded by grief following the loss of their hero in July 2022.
content: In July 2022, brothers Harry and John Souttar lost their hero, but as both prepare to represent different nations at the World Cup, his influence lives on.

zh.title: 两个兄弟，两个国家，一届世界杯——悲痛如何将他们联系在一起

title: Why super-sized and politicised World Cup comes at a cost
summary: The 2026 World Cup's expanded format and political involvement could make it one of the most contentious tournaments in history, with significant costs extending beyond on-field competition.
content: Whatever one's perspective, it seems certain that away from the on-field spectacle, this super-sized World Cup could be among the most contentious ever.

content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

title: 'You're paid to make that decision' – Eriksson's midfield dilemma
summary: Former England players and coaches from the 2006 World Cup squad discuss manager Sven-Goran Eriksson's difficulty in effectively deploying Steven Gerrard and Frank Lampard together in midfield despite their individual talent.
content: Former players and coaching staff from England's 2006 'Golden Generation' reflect on how manager Sven-Goran Eriksson struggled to get the best out of Steven Gerrard and Frank Lampard in a star-studded midfield.

zh.title: "你的职责是做出决定" — 埃里克松的中场困境
zh.summary: 来自2006年世界杯英格兰队的前球员和教练讨论了主教练斯文·戈兰·埃里克松在有效部署史蒂文·杰拉德和弗兰克·兰帕德搭档中场时面临的困难，尽管他们个人天赋出众。
